## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. Link the related issue if applicable: Closes #N -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` — no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `ci` / `build`

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (0 errors, 0 warnings)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Screenshots attached if UI changed
- [ ] Breaking changes documented below

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky, assumptions made, or follow-ups deferred -->
